author: remotely-save
description: Sync notes between local and cloud with smart conflict: S3, Dropbox, webdav, OneDrive, Google Drive, Box, pCloud, Yandex Disk, Koofr, Azure Blob Storage.

manifest.author: fyears
manifest.description: Yet another unofficial plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service.
manifest.name: Remotely Save

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A very large update with half of the code having been refactored!

* More robust deletion sync,
* minimal conflict handling,
* no meta data uploaded any more,
* deletion / modification protection,
* backup mode
* new encryption method
* sync time bugs fixed

**Manually backup your vault firstly**, and enjoy the new version and new features!

超大型更新，基本重构了一半的代码！

* 更稳健的删除同步
* 引入冲突处理
* 避免上传元数据
* 修改删除保护
* 备份模式
* 新的加密方式
* 同步时间的 bug 的修复

先手动备份你的库文件，然后尝试新版本新功能！

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
From this version, a new algorithm has been developed:
* More robust deletion sync,
* minimal conflict handling,
* no meta data uploaded any more,
* deletion / modification protection,
* backup mode
* ...

**Always always make a backup of your vault!!!**

0.4.1 is a beta version, hopefully no obvious bugs around

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
After lots of updates in [0.3.34](https://github.com/remotely-save/remotely-save/releases/tag/0.3.34). Here comes a small update version 0.3.35.

1. s3 / dropbox / onedrive support accurate last modified time now.
2. some deprecated options hidden.
4. some useless methods removed.
4. even more docs.

Hopefully the next version is a big update with syncing algorithm update and encryption update. Stay tune!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Remotely Save is back to the party!

Hi everyone, long time no see! Finally some awesome features are updated into Remotely Save here!

Warning: I try hard to keep everything working, but expect some bugs though. **Always always make a backup of your vault!!!**

1. Webdav compatibility should get some improvements because I manually test the plugin on many webdav implementations.
2. S3 custom prefix! So users can store multiple vaults in a same bucket.
3. `.obsidian` deletions are tracked! So the sync of this folder should be more useful!
4. Community contribution by @ras0q and I push it even further: [Ignore path by regexes](https://github.com/remotely-save/remotely-save/pull/414)! That's an advanced feature and it's quite useful.
5. Community contribution by @smpurkis and I fix some bugs: [Sync On Save](https://github.com/remotely-save/remotely-save/pull/340)! Batteries is impacted though. Finnally I get it merged.
6. Community contribution by @Drumber : [Status Bar](https://github.com/remotely-save/remotely-save/pull/168) on desktop! Finnally I get it merged.
7. Allowing setting deletions moved to system trash or `.trash`.
8. Ignore some special annoying OS files by default.
9. Reduce hints by default unless you set the debugging level.
10. [Many tutorials](https://github.com/remotely-save/remotely-save/tree/master/docs/remote_services). Some of them are already from community. Even more are welcome!
11. Basic remote debugging supported inspired from a [discussion](https://github.com/sboesen/remotely-sync/discussions/78) on a fork.
12. All npm libraries get updated.
13. Some kind of donations are accepted.
